cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. There are five people on a soccer team: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. At the start of the match, their positions are assigned as follows: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper Then, there are several swaps. Let me track each swap step by step. First, Dave and Bob trade positions. So initially, Dave is a cheerleader and Bob is a right midfielder. After swapping, Dave becomes the right midfielder and Bob becomes the cheerleader. Second, Dave and Eve trade positions. Now, Dave was the right midfielder, and Eve is the goalkeeper. After swapping, Dave becomes the goalkeeper and Eve becomes the right midfielder. Third, Alice and Bob trade positions. At this point, Alice is the right winger and Bob is the cheerleader. After swapping, Alice becomes the cheerleader and Bob becomes the right winger. Fourth, Dave and Claire trade positions. Dave is currently the goalkeeper, and Claire is the left winger. After swapping, Dave becomes the left winger and Claire becomes the goalkeeper. Fifth, Dave and Eve trade positions again. Now, Dave is the left winger and Eve is the right midfielder. After swapping, Dave becomes the right midfielder and Eve becomes the left winger. So now, after all these swaps, let's check where Bob is. Initially, Bob was the right midfielder. After the first swap, he became the cheerleader. Then, during the third swap with Alice, he became the right winger. Since then, there's no swap involving Bob anymore. Therefore, Bob ends up as the right winger. Let me just double-check by writing down the positions after each swap. Initial positions: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper After first swap (Dave and Bob): - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: goalkeeper After second swap (Dave and Eve): - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder After third swap (Alice and Bob): - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder After fourth swap (Dave and Claire): - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: left winger - Eve: right midfielder After fifth swap (Dave and Eve): - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: left winger? No, wait. Wait, after fourth swap, Dave is left winger and Eve is right midfielder. Then fifth swap is Dave and Eve swapping. So after fifth swap, Dave becomes right midfielder and Eve becomes left winger. So the final positions are: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger
